trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "Exercise kindness, for nothing remains small forever. —Alacrian proverb" — The speaker is attributed to 'Alacrian' — an adjective from the plane Alacria, a newly named locale in Aetherdrift. This is one of the first in-universe uses of 'Alacrian' as a cultural marker, suggesting the proverb tradition of a specific people or region within the Aetherdrift multiverse. [Scryfall: flavor_text field]

Bestow Greatness is a 3-mana instant (2G) granting +4/+4 and trample until end of turn — functionally similar to Might of Oaks and Become Immense. Crucially it is Pauper-legal (unlike several comparable pump spells), making it a legitimate budget option in Pauper green stompy. EDHREC rank 14,619 — moderate inclusion; pump instants rarely chart high but this hits the sweet spot of cost versus effect. [Scryfall: legalities pauper: legal, edhrec_rank 14619]

Previewed by CoolStuffInc on January 24, 2025, in an article titled 'Official Aetherdrift Previews — Who Let The Dogs Out.' Artist is Jeff Carpenter. No prior printings. [Scryfall: preview source CoolStuffInc 2025-01-24, reprint: false, artist Jeff Carpenter]

related_cards.name: Giant Growth
related_cards.note: The original pump instant; Bestow Greatness is the pushed 3-mana version with trample added

related_cards.name: Become Immense
related_cards.note: Similar +4/+4 and trample pump for 1 mana with delve cost; Bestow Greatness is the non-delve analogue

related_cards.name: Might of Oaks
related_cards.note: +7/+7 pump at the same CMC without trample — comparison card for evaluating Bestow Greatness's rate
